name: Cheese Blintzes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Pancake & Waffle Mix (Aunt Jemima Original)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine ricotta cheese, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed on an electric mixer until smooth. Cover and chill until ready to use.
2. Combine eggs, milk, pancake mix, and oil in another bowl; mix until smooth. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Heat a 6- to 7-inch skillet over medium-high heat. For each pancake, pour about 1/4 cup batter into the hot, prepared pan. Tilt the pan to coat the bottom evenly with a thin layer of batter.
4. Cook for 45 seconds or until the top looks dry. Turn and cook an additional 20 seconds on the other side.
5. Stack pancakes between sheets of wax paper.
6. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
7. Grease a 13 x 9-inch glass baking dish with about 1 teaspoon melted margarine.
8. Spoon 2 rounded tablespoons of filling into the center of each pancake. Fold both sides over the filling, then fold up the ends to form a rectangle.
9. Place blintzes in the prepared dish and brush with remaining margarine.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until heated through. Serve with dairy sour half and half and strawberry preserves, if desired.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS PER SERVING:
Calories: 196
Carbohydrates: 14 g
Protein: 8 g
Fat: 12 g
Calcium: 187 mg
Sodium: 240 mg
Cholesterol: 90 mg
Dietary Fiber: 0 g
